meaning: adv.不论从任何观点,不管怎样
examples: Well, anyways, she said it wasn't safe.
"I reckon so," said Huckleberry; "anyways, I'm suited."
She talks awful, but talk don't hurt--anyways it don't if she don't cry.
As a potentially pivotal senator, he may be more influential than a Cabinet secretary anyways.
Anyways, the point is that we think about these programs in somewhat inconsistent ways.
